records.chapter: Reward of meeting a believer to make him happy
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. And from the previous chain from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ahmad b. Muhammad from Nadhar b. Wakee’ from al-Rabee’ b. Sabeeh who raised this narration to The Prophet (s.a.w.s.) who said: “One who meets a believer to please him, Allah will make the former happy on the Day of Judgment. One who meets a believer to make him sad, Allah will make the former sad on the Day of Judgment.”
records.arabicText: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ نَضْرِ بْنِ وَکِیعٍ عَنِ الرَّبِیعِ بْنِ صَبِیحٍ رَفَعَ الْحَدِیثَ إِلَی النَّبِیِّ ص قَالَ: مَنْ لَقِیَ أَخَاهُ بِمَا یَسُرُّهُ سَرَّهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ مَنْ لَقِیَ أَخَاهُ بِمَا یَسُوؤُهُ لِیَسُوءَهُ سَاءَهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ یَلْقَاهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. And from the previous chain from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ahmad b. Muhammad from Nadhar b. Wakee’ from al-Rabee’ b. Sabeeh who raised this narration to The Prophet (s.a.w.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who meets a believer to please him, Allah will make the former happy on the Day of Judgment. One who meets a believer to make him sad, Allah will make the former sad on the Day of Judgment.”

records.chapter: Reward of applying perfume to a Muslim
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. Abi (rah) from Ahmad b. Idris from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ahmad b. Muhammad who raised it to Basheer al-Dahhan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who applies perfume to a Muslim, the Almighty Allah will grant him a light for each strand of his hair.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ إِدْرِیسَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ یَرْفَعُهُ إِلَی بَشِیرٍ الدَّهَّانِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ دَهَّنَ مُسْلِماً کَتَبَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَهُ بِکُلِّ شَعْرَهٍ نُوراً یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. Abi (rah) from Ahmad b. Idris from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ahmad b. Muhammad who raised it to Basheer al-Dahhan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who applies perfume to a Muslim, the Almighty Allah will grant him a light for each strand of his hair.”

records.chapter: Reward of loving each other for the sake of Allah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Musa Kadhim (a.s.) said, “People who love each other for the sake of Allah will be sitting on the pulpits of light on the Day of Judgment. Their faces and body  will  be  illuminated  and  the  light  of  pulpits  will illuminate everything. People will recognize those people as those who loved each other for the sake of Allah.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ ع قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ یَقُولُ المتحابین [الْمُتَحَابُّونَ] فِی اللَّهِ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ عَلَی مَنَابِرَ مِنْ نُورٍ قَدْ أَضَاءَ نُورُ وُجُوهِهِمْ وَ أَجْسَادِهِمْ وَ نُورُ مَنَابِرِهِمْ عَلَی کُلِّ شَیْ ءٍ حَتَّی یُعْرَفُوا أَنَّهُمُ الْمُتَحَابُّونَ فِی اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ.

records.chapter: Reward of remembering Allah while entering a valley
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates from his predecessors that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “One who goes to a valley and   remembers   and   supplicates   the   Almighty   Allah spreading his hands, the Almighty Allah will fill the entire valley with goodness for every big and small thing present there.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ بُنَانِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْمُغِیرَهِ عَنِ السَّکُونِیِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرٍ الصَّادِقِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ النَّبِیُّ ص مَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ سَلَکَ وَادِیاً فَیَبْسُطُ کَفَّیْهِ فَیَذْکُرُ اللَّهَ وَ یَدْعُو إِلَّا مَلَأَ اللَّهُ ذَلِکَ الْوَادِیَ حَسَنَاتٍ فَلْیَعْظُمْ ذَلِکَ الْوَادِی أَوِ لْیَصْغُرْ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates from his predecessors that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who goes to a valley and   remembers   and   supplicates   the   Almighty   Allah spreading his hands, the Almighty Allah will fill the entire valley with goodness for every big and small thing present there.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Innallaaha yumassikus samaawaati…before going to bed
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muhammad b. Isa from Abbas b. Hilal al-Shami from Abi al-Hassan al-Ridha from his father (a.s.) who said: Imam Ridha (a.s.) narrates from his predecessors that one who recites the following verse before going to bed, his house will never be damaged: Innallaaha yumassikus samaawaati wal arz”a antazoolaa wala-in zaalataa in amsakahumaa min ah’adim mim ba’dihi innahu kaanaa h’aleeman ghafooraa.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ عَبَّاسِ بْنِ هِلَالٍ الشَّامِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا عَنْ أَبِیهِ ع قَالَ: لَمْ یَقُلْ أَحَدٌ قَطُّ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ یَنَامَ- إِنَّ اللَّهَ یُمْسِکُ السَّماواتِ وَ الْأَرْضَ أَنْ تَزُولا وَ لَئِنْ زالَتا إِنْ أَمْسَکَهُما مِنْ أَحَدٍ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ إِنَّهُ کانَ حَلِیماً غَفُوراً فَیَسْقُطَ عَلَیْهِ الْبَیْتُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muhammad b. Isa from Abbas b. Hilal al-Shami from Abi al-Hassan al-Ridha from his father (a.s.) who said: Imam Ridha (a.s.) narrates from his predecessors that one who recites the following verse before going to bed, his house will never be damaged:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Innallaaha yumassikus samaawaati wal arz”a antazoolaa wala-in zaalataa in amsakahumaa min ah’adim mim ba’dihi innahu kaanaa h’aleeman ghafooraa.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting the following supplication after Azaan of Morning and Maghrib Prayers
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Isa from Abbas slave of al-Ridha from Abi al-Hassan (a.s.) who said: “One who recites the following supplication after Azaan of Morning and Maghrib Prayers and if he dies on that day or night he would have died after repenting (forgiven): Allaahumma innee as-aluka bi-iqbaali nahaarika wa idbaari lailika wa h’uz”oori s’alawaatika wa as’waati duaa’tika an tatooba a’layya innaka antat tawwaabur rah’eem.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِیسَی عَنْ عَبَّاسٍ مَوْلَی الرِّضَا عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَالَ حِینَ یَسْمَعُ أَذَانَ الصُّبْحِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّی أَسْأَلُکَ بِإِقْبَالِ نَهَارِکَ وَ إِدْبَارِ لَیْلِکَ وَ حُضُورِ صَلَوَاتِکَ وَ أَصْوَاتِ دُعَاتِکَ وَ تَسْبِیحِ مَلَائِکَتِکَ أَنْ تَتُوبَ عَلَیَ إِنَّکَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِیمُ وَ مِثْلَ ذَلِکَ إِذَا سَمِعَ أَذَانَ الْمَغْرِبِ ثُمَّ مَاتَ مِنْ یَوْمِهِ أَوْ لَیْلَتِهِ کَانَ تَائِباً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Isa from Abbas slave of al-Ridha from Abi al-Hassan (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites the following supplication after Azaan of Morning and Maghrib Prayers and if he dies on that day or night he would have died after repenting (forgiven): Allaahumma innee as-aluka bi-iqbaali nahaarika wa idbaari lailika wa h’uz”oori s’alawaatika wa as’waati duaa’tika an tatooba a’layya innaka antat tawwaabur rah’eem.”

records.chapter: Reward of supplicating after knowing that Allah is capable of benefiting as well as harming
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  narrates  that  the  Holy  Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “Allah says: One who supplicates to Me after knowing  that  only  I  am  capable  of  benefiting  as  well  as harming, I will accept his supplication.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ بَکْرٍ عَنْ زَکَرِیَّا عَنْ أَبِی سَیَّارٍ عَنْ سَوْرَهَ بْنِ کُلَیْبٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ مَنْ سَأَلَنِی وَ هُوَ یَعْلَمُ أَنِّی أَضُرُّ وَ أَنْفَعُ اسْتَجَبْتُ لَهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  narrates  that  the  Holy  Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Allah says: One who supplicates to Me after knowing  that  only  I  am  capable  of  benefiting  as  well  as harming, I will accept his supplication.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting the following supplications before going to bed
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Abbas b. Ma’ruf from Muhammad b. Bukayr from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Alh’amdulillaahilladhee a’laa faqahara walh’amdu lillaahilladhee bat’ana fakhabara wal h’amdulillaahilladhee malaka faqadara wal h’amdulillaahilladhee yuh’yil mautaa wa yumeetul ah’yaa-u wa huwa a’laa kulli shai-in Qadeer thrice before going to bed will become as pure as a newborn baby.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ بُکَیْرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَالَ حِینَ یَأْخُذُ مَضْجَعَهُ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِی عَلَا فَقَهَرَ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِی بَطَنَ فَخَبَرَ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِی مَلَکَ فَقَدَرَ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِی یُحْیِی الْمَوْتَی وَ یُمِیتُ الْأَحْیَاءَ- وَ هُوَ عَلی کُلِّ شَیْ ءٍ قَدِیرٌ خَرَجَ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ کَهَیْئَهِ یَوْمَ وَلَدَتْهُ أُمُّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Abbas b. Ma’ruf from Muhammad b. Bukayr from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Alh’amdulillaahilladhee a’laa faqahara walh’amdu lillaahilladhee bat’ana fakhabara wal h’amdulillaahilladhee malaka faqadara wal h’amdulillaahilladhee yuh’yil mautaa wa yumeetul ah’yaa-u wa huwa a’laa kulli shai-in Qadeer thrice before going to bed will become as pure as a newborn baby.”

records.chapter: Reward of supplicating for a Muslim brother in his absence
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far al-Himyari from Muhammad b. al-Hussain from al-Talisani [al-Tayalisi] from Fudhayl from Muawiyah b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who supplicates for a Muslim brother in his absence, it will increase his income. His problems will end and angels will tell him, ‘You will get twice what you prayed for your believing brother’.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنِ الطالسانی [الطَّیَالِسِیِ] عَنْ فُضَیْلٍ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: دُعَاءُ الْمُسْلِمِ لِأَخِیهِ بِظَهْرِ الْغَیْبِ یَسُوقُ إِلَی الدَّاعِی الرِّزْقَ وَ یَصْرِفُ عَنْهُ الْبَلَاءَ وَ تَقُولُ لَهُ الْمَلَائِکَهُ لَکَ مِثْلَاهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far al-Himyari from Muhammad b. al-Hussain from al-Talisani [al-Tayalisi] from Fudhayl from Muawiyah b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who supplicates for a Muslim brother in his absence, it will increase his income. His problems will end and angels will tell him, ‘You will get twice what you prayed for your believing brother’.”

records.chapter: Reward of love of the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) and reciting salutations (Salawaat) on him
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Amirul Momineen (a.s.) said, “Reciting salutations on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) wipes the sins sooner than the time taken by water to extinguish fire. Reciting salutations on him is better than freeing a few slaves. It is better than sacrificing lives and fighting with a sword in the way of Allah.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیٍّ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ عِیسَی الْحَسَنِیِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی رُشَیْدُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِی إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ عَبَّاسٍ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حَمْزَهَ عَنْ أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع قَالَ: الصَّلَاهُ عَلَی النَّبِیِّ ص أَمْحَقُ لِلْخَطَایَا مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِلنَّارِ وَ السَّلَامُ عَلَی النَّبِیِّ ص أَفْضَلُ مِنْ عِتْقِ رِقَابٍ وَ حُبُّ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ص أَفْضَلُ مِنْ مُهَجِ الْأَنْفُسِ أَوْ قَالَ ضَرْبِ السُّیُوفِ فِی سَبِیلِ اللَّهِ.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutation (Salawaat) on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) once
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah who said it was narrated to me by Salamah b. al-Khattab from Ismail b. Ja’far from al-Hussain b. Ali from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Whenever the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) is mentioned, send salutations on him excessively. One who sends salutation on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) once, the Almighty Allah will order one thousand rows having a thousand angels each to send salutation on that person. Everything in this universe will send salutations on him because of the salutations of Allah and the angels. Allah and His Messenger (s.a.w.s.) are wary of ignorant and proud people. Hence no one hesitates reciting salutation on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) except an ignorant and a proud man.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَلَمَهُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: إِذَا ذُکِرَ النَّبِیُّ ص فَأَکْثِرُوا الصَّلَاهَ عَلَیْهِ فَإِنَّهُ مَنْ صَلَّی عَلَی النَّبِیِّ ص صَلَاهً وَاحِدَهً صَلَّی اللَّهُ عَلَیْهِ أَلْفَ صَلَاهٍ فِی أَلْفِ صَفٍّ مِنَ الْمَلَائِکَهِ وَ لَمْ یَبْقَ شَیْ ءٌ مِمَّا خَلَقَ اللَّهُ إِلَّا صَلَّی عَلَی ذَلِکَ الْعَبْدِ لِصَلَاهِ اللَّهِ عَلَیْهِ وَ صَلَاهِ مَلَائِکَتِهِ وَ لَا یَرْغَبُ عَنْ هَذَا إِلَّا جَاهِلٌ مَغْرُورٌ وَ قَدْ بَرِئَ اللَّهُ مِنْهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah who said it was narrated to me by Salamah b. al-Khattab from Ismail b. Ja’far from al-Hussain b. Ali from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Whenever the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) is mentioned, send salutations on him excessively. One who sends salutation on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) once, the Almighty Allah will order one thousand rows having a thousand angels each to send salutation on that person. Everything in this universe will send salutations on him because of the salutations of Allah and the angels. Allah and His Messenger (s.a.w.s.) are wary of ignorant and proud people. Hence no one hesitates reciting salutation on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) except an ignorant and a proud man.”

records.chapter: Reward of asking from Allah in the name of Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Hassan b. Ali from al-Abbas b. ’Amir from Ahmad b. Rizq-Allah from Yahya b. al-’Ala from Jabir from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: ‘O Lord! Have mercy on me for the sake of Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny’ Allah will order Jibraeel (a.s.) to go down and grant salvation to him. Jibraeel (a.s.) will ask, ‘How should I get down in fire?’ Allah will say: I have ordered it to remain cool for you and you will not be harmed. Jibraeel (a.s.) will ask, ‘O Lord! Tell me where is that servant of Yours?’ Allah will say that he is in the well of Sijjil. Jibraeel (a.s.) will go there and remove him from fire. Allah will ask, ‘O slave of Mine! For how long did you remain there?’ He will reply, ‘O Lord! It is not possible for me to estimate it’. Allah will swear by His Honor and say: I would have kept you in Hell in the same state if you hadn’t prayed to Me in this way. I have made it obligatory for Myself to forgive any number of sins of one who supplicates in the name of Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny just like I forgave you this day.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ رِزْقِ اللَّهِ عَنْ یَحْیَی بْنِ الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ عَبْداً مَکَثَ فِی النَّارِ سَبْعِینَ خَرِیفاً وَ الْخَرِیفُ سَبْعُونَ سَنَهً قَالَ ثُمَّ إِنَّهُ سَأَلَ اللَّهَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَیْتِهِ لَمَّا رَحِمْتَنِی فَأَوْحَی اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَی جَبْرَئِیلَ أَنِ اهْبِطْ إِلَی عَبْدِی وَ أَخْرِجْهُ قَالَ یَا رَبِّ کَیْفَ لِی بِالْهُبُوطِ فِی النَّارِ قَالَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِنِّی أَمَرْتُهَا أَنْ تَکُونَ عَلَیْکَ بَرْداً وَ سَلَاماً قَالَ یَا رَبِّ فَأَعْلِمْنِی بِمَوْضِعِهِ قَالَ إِنَّهُ فِی جُبٍّ فِی سِجِّیلٍ قَالَ فَهَبَطَ جَبْرَئِیلُ عَلَی النَّارِ عَلَی وَجْهِهِ فَأَخْرَجَهُ فَقَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ یَا عَبْدِی کَمْ لَبِثْتَ فِی النَّارِ قَالَ مَا أُحْصِی یَا رَبِّ فَقَالَ لَهُ وَ عِزَّتِی لَوْ لَا مَا سَأَلْتَنِی بِهِ لَأَطَلْتُ هَوَانَکَ فِی النَّارِ وَ لَکِنِّی حَتَمْتُ عَلَی نَفْسِی أَلَّا یَسْأَلَنِی عَبْدٌ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَیْتِهِ إِلَّا غَفَرْتُ لَهُ مَا کَانَ بَیْنِی وَ بَیْنَهُ وَ قَدْ غَفَرْتُ لَکَ الْیَوْمَ.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutation (Salawaat) on thebHoly Prophet (s.a.w.s.)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam   Muhammad   Baqir   (a.s.)   narrates   from   his predecessors  that  the  Holy  Prophet  (s.a.w.s.)  said,  “I  will stand near Mizan on the Day of Judgment. If I see a person whose sins are more than his good deeds I will keep the salutations recited on me by him in the pan of good deeds and make it tilt in his favor.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ السِّنْدِیِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْبَخْتَرِیِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ آبَائِهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص أَنَا عِنْدَ الْمِیزَانِ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ فَمَنْ ثَقُلَتْ سَیِّئَاتُهُ عَلَی حَسَنَاتِهِ جِئْتُ بِالصَّلَاهِ عَلَیَّ حَتَّی أُثَقِّلَ بِهَا حَسَنَاتِهِ.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutation (Salawaat) on thebHoly Prophet (s.a.w.s.)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2.  The narrator told Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “When I entered the  house  of  Allah,  I  didn’t  remember  any  supplication except  salutations  on  the  Holy  Prophet  (s.a.w.s.).”  Imam (a.s.) replied, “No one present there did a better deed than you.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَسِّنُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَبَانٍ الْأَحْمَرِ عَنْ عَبْدِ السَّلَامِ بْنِ نُعَیْمٍ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع إِنِّی دَخَلْتُ الْبَیْتَ فَلَمْ یَحْضُرْنِی شَیْ ءٌ مِنَ الدُّعَاءِ إِلَّا الصَّلَاهَ عَلَی النَّبِیِّ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالَ ع وَ لَمْ یَخْرُجْ أَحَدٌ بِأَفْضَلَ مِمَّا خَرَجْتَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 2.  The narrator told Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.),
records.thaqalaynMatn: “When I entered the  house  of  Allah,  I  didn’t  remember  any  supplication except  salutations  on  the  Holy  Prophet  (s.a.w.s.).”  Imam (a.s.) replied, “No one present there did a better deed than you.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutation (Salawaat) on thebHoly Prophet (s.a.w.s.)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 3.  Amirul Momineen (a.s.) said,  “No supplication reaches the  heaven  unless  one  recites  salutation  on  Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny.”
records.arabicText: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْمُغِیرَهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْکَرِیمِ الْخَزَّازِ عَنْ أَبِی إِسْحَاقَ السَّبِیعِیِّ عَنِ الْحَارِثِ الْأَعْوَرِ قَالَ قَالَ أَمِیرُ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ عَلِیُّ بْنُ أَبِی طَالِبٍ ع کُلُّ دُعَاءٍ مَحْجُوبٌ عَنِ السَّمَاءِ حَتَّی تُصَلِّیَ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutations (Salawaat) a hundred times after Morning Prayer
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from Abi Ayoob’ from al-Sabah b. Sayabeh from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Recite: Allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa aali muh’ammad a hundred times after Morning Prayer so that the Almighty Allah keeps your face safe from the fire of Hell.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ أَبِی أَیُّوبَ عَنِ الصَّبَّاحِ بْنِ سَیَابَهَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَ لَا أُعَلِّمُکَ شَیْئاً یَقِی اللَّهُ بِهِ وَجْهَکَ مِنْ حَرِّ جَهَنَّمَ قَالَ قُلْتُ بَلَی قَالَ قُلْ بَعْدَ الْفَجْرِ اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ مِائَهَ مَرَّهٍ یَقِی اللَّهُ بِهِ وَجْهَکَ مِنْ حَرِّ جَهَنَّمَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from Abi Ayoob’ from al-Sabah b. Sayabeh from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Recite: Allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa aali muh’ammad a hundred times after Morning Prayer so that the Almighty Allah keeps your face safe from the fire of Hell.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutation (Salawaat) on Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from the one that narrated to him from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says that he has read in a heavenly scripture, “Allah will write a thousand rewards for one who sends salutations on Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny. For one who recites Allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa ahli baitih Allah will write a thousand rewards.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَمَّنْ أَخْبَرَهُ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: وَجَدْتُ فِی بَعْضِ الْکُتُبِ مَنْ صَلَّی عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ مِائَهَ حَسَنَهٍ وَ مَنْ قَالَ صَلَّی اللَّهُ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَیْتِهِ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ أَلْفَ حَسَنَهٍ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from the one that narrated to him from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says that he has read in a heavenly scripture,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Allah will write a thousand rewards for one who sends salutations on Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny. For one who recites Allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa ahli baitih Allah will write a thousand rewards.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutation (Salawaat) on Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) a hundred times on Friday
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ridha (a.s.) narrates that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “One who recites salutation on me a hundred times on Friday, the Almighty Allah will fulfill his thirty desires of this world and the hereafter each.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَیْلِ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ صَلَّی عَلَیَّ یَوْمَ الْجُمُعَهِ مِائَهَ صَلَاهٍ قَضَی اللَّهُ لَهُ سِتِّینَ حَاجَهً ثَلَاثُونَ لِلدُّنْیَا وَ ثَلَاثُونَ لِلْآخِرَهِ.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Innallaaha wa Malaaikatahu…after Morning and Maghrib Prayers
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  It is narrated that Imam Ridha (a.s.) said, “One who recites: Innallaaha wa malaa-ikatahu yus’alloona a’lan nabiyyi yaa ayyuhalladheenaa   aamanoo   s’alloo   a’laihi   wa   sallimoo tasleemaa. Allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa aali muh’ammad   immediately   after   Morning   and   Maghrib Prayers,  the  Almighty  Allah  will  fulfill  his  one  hundred wishes out of which seventy will be fulfilled in the world and  thirty  in  the  hereafter.”  The  narrator  asked,  “What  is meant by the salutation of Allah, angels and the believers?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “The salutation of Allah is sending down of His mercy. The salutation of angels is his glorification and the salutation of the believers is a supplication for him. One of the secrets of Aale Muhammad is in the salutation on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny: Allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa aali muh’ammadin fil malaa-il a- a’laa wa s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa aali muh’ammadin fil   mursaleen.   Allaahumma’t’i   muh’ammadal   waseelata washsharafa     wal     faz”eelata     waddarajatal     kabeeah. Allaahumma   innee   aamantu   bimuh’ammadinw   wa   lam arahu    falaa    tah’rimnee    yaumal    qiyaamati    ru-yatahu warzuqnee    suh’batahu    wa    tawaffanee    a’laa    millatihi wasqinee   min   h’auz”ihi   mashrabar   rawiyyan   saa-ighan hanee-al  laa  az’ma-u  ba’dahu  abadaa.  Innaka  a’laa  kulli shai-in       Qadeer.       Allaahumma       kamaa       aamantu bimuh’ammadinw  wa  lam  arahu  fa-a’rrifnee  filjinaani  waj- hah.   Allaahumma   balligh   rooh’a   muh’ammadin   a’nnee tah’iyyatan katheeratanw wa salaamaa. One who recites this salutation thrice everyday in morning and in the evening, his sins are wiped off and forgiven. He will   remain   happy   forever.   His   supplications   will   be accepted.  His  wishes  will  be  fulfilled.  His  earnings  will improve. He will get assistance against his enemy. Causes of good deeds will come to him and he will get the company of prophets in high gardens.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِی عَنْ أَبِی الْمُغِیرَهِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ قَالَ فِی دُبُرِ صَلَاهِ الصُّبْحِ وَ صَلَاهِ الْمَغْرِبِ قَبْلَ أَنْ یَثْنِیَ رِجْلَیْهِ أَوْ یُکَلِّمَ أَحَداً إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَ مَلائِکَتَهُ یُصَلُّونَ عَلَی النَّبِیِّ یا أَیُّهَا الَّذِینَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَیْهِ وَ سَلِّمُوا تَسْلِیماً اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ ذُرِّیَّتِهِ قَضَی اللَّهُ لَهُ مِائَهَ حَاجَهٍ سَبْعِینَ فِی الدُّنْیَا وَ ثَلَاثِینَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ قَالَ قُلْتُ مَا مَعْنَی صَلَاهِ اللَّهِ وَ مَلَائِکَتِهِ وَ صَلَاهِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ قَالَ صَلَاهُ اللَّهِ رَحْمَهٌ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَ صَلَاهُ مَلَائِکَتِهِ تَزْکِیَهٌ مِنْهُمْ لَهُ وَ صَلَاهُ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ دُعَاءٌ مِنْهُمْ لَهُ وَ مَنْ شَرَّکَ آلَ مُحَمَّدٍ فِی الصَّلَاهِ عَلَی النَّبِیِّ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالَ اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ فِی الْأَوَّلِینَ وَ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ فِی الْآخِرِینَ وَ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ فِی الْمَلَإِ الْأَعْلَی وَ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ فِی الْمُرْسَلِینَ اللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً الْوَسِیلَهَ وَ الشَّرَفَ وَ الْفَضِیلَهَ وَ الدَّرَجَهَ الْکَبِیرَهَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّی آمَنْتُ بِمُحَمَّدٍ وَ لَمْ أَرَهُ فَلَا تَحْرِمْنِی یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ رُؤْیَتَهُ وَ ارْزُقْنِی صُحْبَتَهُ وَ تَوَفَّنِی عَلَی مِلَّتِهِ وَ اسْقِنِی مِنْ حَوْضِهِ مَشْرَباً رَوِیّاً سَائِغاً هَنِیئاً لَا أَظْمَأُ بَعْدَهُ أَبَداً إِنَّکَ عَلی کُلِّ شَیْ ءٍ قَدِیرٌ اللَّهُمَّ کَمَا آمَنْتُ بِمُحَمَّدٍ ص وَ لَمْ أَرَهُ فَعَرِّفْنِی فِی الْجِنَانِ وَجْهَهُ اللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْ رُوحَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِّی تَحِیَّهً کَثِیرَهً وَ سَلَاماً فَإِنَّ مَنْ صَلَّی عَلَی النَّبِیِّ ص بِهَذِهِ الصَّلَاهِ هُدِمَتْ ذُنُوبُهُ وَ مُحِیَتْ خَطَایَاهُ وَ دَامَ سُرُورُهُ وَ اسْتُجِیبَ دُعَاؤُهُ وَ أُعْطِیَ أَمَلَهُ وَ بُسِطَ لَهُ فِی رِزْقِهِ وَ أُعِینَ عَلَی عَدُوِّهِ- وَ هِیَ لَهُ سَبَبُ أَنْوَاعِ الْخَیْرِ وَ یُجْعَلُ مِنْ رُفَقَاءِ نَبِیِّهِ فِی الْجِنَانِ الْأَعْلَی یَقُولُهُنَّ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ غُدْوَهً وَ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ عَشِیَّهً.

records.chapter: Reward of dedicating one-third or half or whole supplication to the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.)
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi who said it was narrated to us by Abi from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from Mazarim who said who said Abu Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Send salutation of Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny before asking for anything from Allah.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ مُرَازِمٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ رَجُلًا أَتَی النَّبِیَّ ص فَقَالَ یَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ص إِنِّی جَعَلْتُ ثُلُثَ صَلَاتِی لَکَ فَقَالَ لَهُ خَیْراً فَقَالَ یَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ص إِنِّی جَعَلْتُ نِصْفَ صَلَاتِی لَکَ فَقَالَ ذَلِکَ أَفْضَلُ قَالَ قَدْ جَعَلْتُ کُلَّ صَلَاتِی لَکَ قَالَ إِذاً یَکْفِیَکَ اللَّهُ مَا أَهَمَّکَ مِنْ أَمْرِ دُنْیَاکَ وَ آخِرَتِکَ فَقَالَ لَهُ رَجُلٌ أَصْلَحَکَ اللَّهُ کَیْفَ یَجْعَلُ صَلَاتَهُ لَهُ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع لَا یَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ شَیْئاً إِلَّا بَدَأَ بِالصَّلَاهِ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi who said it was narrated to us by Abi from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from Mazarim who said who said Abu Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Send salutation of Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny before asking for anything from Allah.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutation (Salawaat) on the progeny of the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) after reciting salutation on him
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Ali b. Ma’bad from Wasil b. Abdillah from Abdillah b. Sinan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: ‘O My servant! Your supplications are accepted and you are fortunate. O angels! Recite seventy salutations on him and I will recite seven hundred salutations on him’.” The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) went on to say, “One who recites salutation on me but does not do so on my progeny there are seventy veils between that salutation and heaven. The Almighty Allah tells him, ‘There is no reply or fortune for you. O angels do not bring his supplication to Me if he does not supplement his salutation on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) with the salutation on his holy progeny’. If one does not join the salutation on my Ahle Bayt along with mine his prayers will remain in the veil (unanswered) forever.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَعْبَدٍ عَنْ وَاصِلِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص ذَاتَ یَوْمٍ لِأَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع أَ لَا أُبَشِّرُکَ قَالَ بَلَی بِأَبِی أَنْتَ وَ أُمِّی فَإِنَّکَ لَمْ تَزَلْ مُبَشِّراً بِکُلِّ خَیْرٍ فَقَالَ أَخْبَرَنِی جَبْرَائِیلُ آنِفاً بِالْعَجَبِ فَقَالَ أَمِیرُ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع وَ مَا الَّذِی أَخْبَرَکَ یَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ص قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِی أَنَّ الرَّجُلَ مِنْ أُمَّتِی إِذَا صَلَّی عَلَیَّ وَ أَتْبَعَ بِالصَّلَاهِ عَلَیَّ أَهْلَ بَیْتِی فُتِّحَتْ لَهُ أَبْوَابُ السَّمَاءِ وَ صَلَّتْ عَلَیْهِ الْمَلَائِکَهُ سَبْعِینَ صَلَاهً وَ أَنَّهُ لِلذَّنْبِ حَطّاً ثُمَّ تَحَاتَّتْ عَنْهُ الذُّنُوبُ کَمَا تَحَاتَّتِ الْوَرَقُ مِنَ الشَّجَرِ وَ یَقُولُ اللَّهُ تَبَارَکَ وَ تَعَالَی لَبَّیْکَ عَبْدِی وَ سَعْدَیْکَ یَا مَلَائِکَتِی أَنْتُمْ تُصَلُّونَ عَلَیْهِ سَبْعِینَ صَلَاهً وَ أَنَا أُصَلِّی عَلَیْهِ سَبْعَمِائَهِ صَلَاهٍ فَإِذَا صَلَّی عَلَیَّ وَ لَمْ یُتْبِعْ بِالصَّلَاهِ عَلَیَّ أَهْلَ بَیْتِی کَانَ بَیْنَهَا وَ بَیْنَ السَّمَاءِ سَبْعُونَ حِجَاباً وَ یَقُولُ اللَّهُ جَلَّ جَلَالُهُ لَا لَبَّیْکَ وَ لَا سَعْدَیْکَ یَا مَلَائِکَتِی لَا تُصْعِدُوا دُعَاءَهُ إِلَّا أَنْ یُلْحِقَ بِالنَّبِیِّ عِتْرَتَهُ فَلَا یَزَالُ مَحْجُوباً حَتَّی یُلْحِقَ بِی أَهْلَ بَیْتِی.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Ali b. Ma’bad from Wasil b. Abdillah from Abdillah b. Sinan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: ‘O My servant! Your supplications are accepted and you are fortunate. O angels! Recite seventy salutations on him and I will recite seven hundred salutations on him’.” The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) went on to say, “One who recites salutation on me but does not do so on my progeny there are seventy veils between that salutation and heaven. The Almighty Allah tells him, ‘There is no reply or fortune for you. O angels do not bring his supplication to Me if he does not supplement his salutation on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) with the salutation on his holy progeny’. If one does not join the salutation on my Ahle Bayt along with mine his prayers will remain in the veil (unanswered) forever.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutations (Salawaat) on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) and his successors after Prayer on Friday
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  The narrator asked Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “Which is the best deed on Friday?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Reciting Durood on Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and his progeny a hundred times after Salaat-e-Asr on Friday. It is better to recite more than that.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِی عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ أَنَّهُ سَأَلَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنْ أَفْضَلِ الْأَعْمَالِ یَوْمَ الْجُمُعَهِ قَالَ الصَّلَاهُ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ مِائَهَ مَرَّهٍ بَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ وَ مَا زَادَتْ فَهُوَ أَفْضَلُ.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutations (Salawaat) on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) and his successors after Prayer on Friday
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2. Who said Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah and in the narration of Abdillah b. Sayabeh and Ibn Ismail from Najayh from one of the Imams (a.s.) who said: It is narrated from Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) or Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) that one should recite the following supplication after Friday Prayer: Allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa aali muh’ammadin al-aus’iyaa-il marz”eena bi-afz”ali s’alawaatika wa baarik a’laihim bi- afz”ali barakaatika was salaamu a’laihi wa a’laihim wa a’laa arwaah’ihim wa ajsaadihim wa rah’matullaahi wa barakaatuh. The Almighty Allah writes a hundred thousand rewards for the reciter and wipes a hundred thousand sins and fulfils a hundred thousand wishes and increases the position by a hundred thousand levels.”
records.arabicText: قَالَ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ وَ فِی رِوَایَهِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سَیَابَهَ وَ ابْنِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ عَنْ نَاجِیَهَ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا ع قَالَ: إِذَا صَلَّیْتَ یَوْمَ الْجُمُعَهِ فَقُلِ اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَوْصِیَاءِ الْمَرْضِیِّینَ بِأَفْضَلِ صَلَوَاتِکَ وَ بَارِکْ عَلَیْهِمْ بِأَفْضَلِ بَرَکَاتِکَ وَ السَّلَامُ عَلَیْهِ وَ عَلَیْهِمْ وَ عَلَی أَرْوَاحِهِمْ وَ أَجْسَادِهِمْ وَ رَحْمَهُ اللَّهِ وَ بَرَکَاتُهُ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَکَ مِائَهَ أَلْفِ حَسَنَهٍ وَ مَحَا عَنْکَ مِائَهَ أَلْفِ سَیِّئَهٍ وَ قَضَی لَکَ بِهَا مِائَهَ أَلْفِ حَاجَهٍ وَ رَفَعَ لَکَ بِهَا مِائَهَ أَلْفِ دَرَجَهٍ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 2. Who said Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah and in the narration of Abdillah b. Sayabeh and Ibn Ismail from Najayh from one of the Imams (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: It is narrated from Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) or Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) that one should recite the following supplication after Friday Prayer: Allaahumma s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa aali muh’ammadin al-aus’iyaa-il marz”eena bi-afz”ali s’alawaatika wa baarik a’laihim bi- afz”ali barakaatika was salaamu a’laihi wa a’laihim wa a’laa arwaah’ihim wa ajsaadihim wa rah’matullaahi wa barakaatuh. The Almighty Allah writes a hundred thousand rewards for the reciter and wipes a hundred thousand sins and fulfils a hundred thousand wishes and increases the position by a hundred thousand levels.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting salutations (Salawaat) on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) and his successors after Prayer on Friday
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 3. And from the previous chain from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi from his father from ’Amru b. Sa’eed from Musdaq b. Sadaqah from Ammar b. Musa al-Sabati who said: “I was in the presence of Abi Abdillah (a.s.), thus a person said, "O Allah, send your blessings upon Muhammad and the household (i.e. Ahl al-Bayt) of Muhammad." So Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said to him: "O man, you have excluded us. Don’t you know that the household are five [which are] the people of the cloak?” He asked, “How should I say?” He (a.s.) replied, “Say: O Allah, send your blessings upon Muhammad and the family (i.e. Al) of Muhammad, and so, we and our Shias are included in it.”
records.arabicText: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ مُصَدِّقِ بْنِ صَدَقَهَ عَنْ عَمَّارِ بْنِ مُوسَی السَّابَاطِیِّ قَالَ: کُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فَقَالَ رَجُلٌ اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَیْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَا هَذَا لَقَدْ ضَیَّقْتَ عَلَیْنَا أَ مَا عَلِمْتَ أَنَّ أَهْلَ الْبَیْتِ خَمْسَهٌ أَصْحَابُ الْکِسَاءِ فَقَالَ الرَّجُلُ کَیْفَ أَقُولُ قَالَ قُلِ اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ فَنَکُونَ نَحْنُ وَ شِیعَتُنَا قَدْ دَخَلْنَا فِیهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 3. And from the previous chain from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi from his father from ’Amru b. Sa’eed from Musdaq b. Sadaqah from Ammar b. Musa al-Sabati who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “I was in the presence of Abi Abdillah (a.s.), thus a person said, "O Allah, send your blessings upon Muhammad and the household (i.e. Ahl al-Bayt) of Muhammad." So Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said to him: "O man, you have excluded us. Don’t you know that the household are five [which are] the people of the cloak?” He asked, “How should I say?” He (a.s.) replied, “Say: O Allah, send your blessings upon Muhammad and the family (i.e. Al) of Muhammad, and so, we and our Shias are included in it.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Rabbi s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa ahli baitih a hundred times in a day
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ja’far who said it was narrated to me by Musa b. ’Imran from al-Hussain b. Yazid from Muawiyah b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites: Rabbi s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa ahli baitih a hundred times in a day, Allah will fulfill his hundred wishes during that day – thirty of which are related to this world while remaining seventy are related to the hereafter.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُوسَی بْنُ عِمْرَانَ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَالَ فِی یَوْمٍ مِائَهَ مَرَّهٍ رَبِّ صَلِّ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلَی أَهْلِ بَیْتِهِ قَضَی اللَّهُ لَهُ مِائَهَ حَاجَهٍ ثَلَاثُونَ مِنْهَا لِلدُّنْیَا وَ سَبْعُونَ مِنْهَا لِلْآخِرَهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ja’far who said it was narrated to me by Musa b. ’Imran from al-Hussain b. Yazid from Muawiyah b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites: Rabbi s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw wa ahli baitih a hundred times in a day, Allah will fulfill his hundred wishes during that day – thirty of which are related to this world while remaining seventy are related to the hereafter.”
